steps.title: Connect goal to action
steps.content: The first sentence states a goal: Brooks and Turner wanted good parts for their female actor friends. The next sentence describes the action they took to achieve that goal.

steps.title: Choose the purpose transition
steps.content: The matching transition means in order to achieve that purpose. Choice A signals restatement, Choice B signals summary, and Choice C signals an example, so none connects the goal to the action. The answer is D.
